# BoxingWiki

> The free, interactive boxing encyclopedia: 98+ boxing techniques with
> step-by-step breakdowns, coaching cues, common mistakes, muscles worked,
> and conditioning drills — plus training programs, a workout generator,
> a round timer, articles, and a glossary of boxing terms.

BoxingWiki is a structured reference. Every technique page follows the same
format: what it is, when to use it, step-by-step execution, muscles involved,
common mistakes, pro tips, and related techniques.

## Techniques

- [All techniques](https://boxingwiki.org/techniques): browsable index of every technique
- [Punches](https://boxingwiki.org/techniques/punches): jab, cross, hooks, uppercuts and variants
- [Defense](https://boxingwiki.org/techniques/defense): blocks, parries, slips, rolls
- [Footwork](https://boxingwiki.org/techniques/footwork): stance, movement, pivots
- [Combinations](https://boxingwiki.org/techniques/combinations): punch sequences and setups
- [Conditioning](https://boxingwiki.org/techniques/conditioning): roadwork, bag work, core training
- Individual technique pages live at https://boxingwiki.org/technique/{id}

## Training

- [Programs](https://boxingwiki.org/programs): multi-week structured training programs
- [Workout generator](https://boxingwiki.org/workout-generator): builds a session from goal, level, and equipment
- [Exercises](https://boxingwiki.org/exercises): strength and conditioning exercise database
- [Round timer](https://boxingwiki.org/timer): boxing round/rest interval timer
- [Leaderboard](https://boxingwiki.org/leaderboard): global XP rankings across fighters

## Learning

- [Articles](https://boxingwiki.org/articles): technique deep-dives, strategy, equipment guides
- [Glossary](https://boxingwiki.org/glossary): boxing terminology definitions
- [Rules](https://boxingwiki.org/rules): boxing rules reference
- [Famous fighters](https://boxingwiki.org/fighters): profiles of notable boxers

## Notes

- Content is free to read; signing in adds progress tracking (XP, streaks,
  a pixel fighter avatar) but is never required to access techniques.
- No paywalled technique content.
